svg.title: MOLECULES smooth animated half-size honeycomb framework
svg.desc: A dark banner with a smoothly drifting infinite, half-size hexagonal carbon framework. Chemically valid Kekule assignments morph through transient aromatic sextet notation behind MOLECULES.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif
